             Enqueue("godscore_breakdown", $"{Ts()},{tickId},{setupId},{footprintScore},{wyckoffScore},{auctionScore},{microstructureScore},{macroScore},{totalGodscore},{threshold},{passFail}");
         }
 
-        public void LogSelectorDecision(long tickId, string setupId, double godscore, int candidatesCount, string selectedSetupId, string rejectionReasonsJson, string finalDecision)
+        public void LogSelectorDecision(in SelectorDecisionEvent ev)
         {
-            Enqueue("selector_decisions", $"{Ts()},{tickId},{setupId},{godscore},{candidatesCount},{selectedSetupId},{Escape(rejectionReasonsJson)},{finalDecision}");
+            Enqueue("selector_decisions", $"{Ts()},{ev.TickId},{ev.SetupId},{ev.Godscore},{ev.CandidatesCount},{ev.SelectedSetupId},{Escape(ev.RejectionReasonsJson)},{ev.FinalDecision}");
         }

diff --git a/OracleV5.Strategy/Observability/ForensicTelemetryHub.cs b/OracleV5.Strategy/Observability/ForensicTelemetryHub.cs
index 185da78..81f1d19 100644
--- a/OracleV5.Strategy/Observability/ForensicTelemetryHub.cs
+++ b/OracleV5.Strategy/Observability/ForensicTelemetryHub.cs
@@ -144,6 +144,21 @@ namespace OracleV5
                 microstructureScore, macroScore, string.Equals(passFail, "PASS", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
         }
 
+        public static void EmitSelectorDecision(in SelectorDecisionEvent ev)
+        {
+            var copy = ev;
+            Safe(() => _csv?.LogSelectorDecision(in copy));
+
+            OracleRtdPublisher.Publish("selector.candidates_count", ev.CandidatesCount);
+            OracleRtdPublisher.Publish("selector.selected_setup_id", ev.SelectedSetupId ?? string.Empty);
+            OracleRtdPublisher.Publish("selector.last_decision", ev.FinalDecision ?? string.Empty);
+            OracleRtdPublisher.PublishPipelineStage("SELECTOR",
+                !string.IsNullOrEmpty(ev.FinalDecision) &&
+                ev.FinalDecision.IndexOf("REJECT", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) < 0,
+                ev.RejectionReasonsJson);
+        }
+
+        [Obsolete("Use EmitSelectorDecision(in SelectorDecisionEvent ev) instead")]
         public static void EmitSelectorDecision(
             long tickId,
             string setupId,
@@ -153,16 +168,8 @@ namespace OracleV5
             string rejectionReasonsJson,
             string finalDecision)
         {
-            Safe(() => _csv?.LogSelectorDecision(
+            EmitSelectorDecision(new SelectorDecisionEvent(
                 tickId, setupId, godscore, candidatesCount, selectedSetupId, rejectionReasonsJson, finalDecision));
-
-            OracleRtdPublisher.Publish("selector.candidates_count", candidatesCount);
-            OracleRtdPublisher.Publish("selector.selected_setup_id", selectedSetupId ?? string.Empty);
-            OracleRtdPublisher.Publish("selector.last_decision", finalDecision ?? string.Empty);
-            OracleRtdPublisher.PublishPipelineStage("SELECTOR",
-                !string.IsNullOrEmpty(finalDecision) &&
-                finalDecision.IndexOf("REJECT", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) < 0,
-                rejectionReasonsJson);
         }
 
         public static void EmitRiskDecision(
@@ -331,6 +338,15 @@ namespace OracleV5
         }
     }
 
+    public readonly record struct SelectorDecisionEvent(
+        long TickId,
+        string SetupId,
+        double Godscore,
+        int CandidatesCount,
+        string SelectedSetupId,
+        string RejectionReasonsJson,
+        string FinalDecision);
+
     public sealed class ForensicStrategySnapshot
     {
         public bool IsFoundationReady { get; set; }
